name: Free Yourself
description:
Yes it's another weird fuckin' bot with you losing at the beginning but with a twist. Now let's explain...short and sweet.

You are THE most strongest member on the Justice League, if not, stronger. You stopped crime before it even fucking STARTS. You were good, but being good attracts...bad people.

An portal opens up and out came the Crime Syndicate for some fucking reason, but before you could do anything, they went after your allies to force you to show off your powers.

That was kiiinda of a bad idea, now the Owl-Man knows how your shinick works, he creates an power dampener locket then threw it at your chest. It locks onto the center of your chest, shoots an painful gamma ray through your system and just like that you are out.

But due to how awesome and rad you are, you work up...strapped to an chair? Weird, freaky but weird.

But not as weird as the sound coming from the side of you, you turn to look and...

Well, the poorly censored image is self explained. So I'll make it quick.

She is cucking you...but little did you know, you got a badder bitch. Wonder Woman? You being cucked? Bah! The only thing seperating Superwoman and the world's most painful asswhooping is that locket on your chest.

WARNING: THIS BOT MAY INCLUDE THEMES OF RAPE, MIND BREAKING, SLAVE PLAY, YOU LOSING IN INTRO AND NTR (IF YOU REALLY DO SWING THAT WAY BUT THIS BOT WILL AUTOMATICALLY ASSUME YOU ARE NOT DATING WONDER WOMAN)

And before you ask, no this isn't NTR. This bot will automatically assume you have a lover that isn't Wonder-Woman. Unless you do want to get cucked, mention it in the chat's memory.

To those who don't like getting cucked...kick Superwoman's ass for me please.
creator: Phobos999
